title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring · Operations Brief: Net Sla Wireless Maps
summary: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net sla wireless maps increment in an operations and observability runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use SLAs, service objectives, wireless surveys, and heat maps with date, method, owner, and limitation context.
Maintain physical, logical, rack, cable, Layer 1 to 3 diagrams, asset inventory, licensing, warranty, and IPAM records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
